/usr/bin/c++      CMakeFiles/can_debug_tools.dir/src/can_debug.cpp.o  -o /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/can_debug_tools/can_debug_tools -rdynamic /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libcan_debug_tools_core.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libmcp_can_rpi.so -lboost_program_options -lpthread /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libroscpp.so -lboost_filesystem -lboost_signals /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread -lconsole_bridge -lwiringPi -lrt -lcrypt -Wl,-rpath,/home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/kinetic/lib:
